untranslatable_reason: This signal requires cross-sectional ranking and relative positioning within a stock universe, which cannot be expressed as single-instrument indicator conditions. The strategy needs: (1) ranking of all stocks by relative return or P/E ratio, (2) identification of lowest/highest ranked stocks, and (3) portfolio-level construction logic. The entry conditions depend on dynamic rank positions across a universe, not absolute threshold levels on individual price bars.
translation_notes: Signal is a cross-sectional mean reversion strategy requiring universe-level ranking and relative position assessment. Standard backtest engine conditions cannot capture the competitive ranking and relative value positioning required. Recommend implementing as custom universe ranking logic in backtest framework rather than threshold-based rules.
